General.Name: Futong Technology Development Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Futong Technology Development Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides enterprise digital transformation services primarily in the People's Republic of China. It operates through three segments: Enterprise Management Business, Intelligent Health Management Business, and Intelligent Application Business. The Enterprise Management Business segment engages in the provision of IT infrastructure products, cloud computing management products, and cloud computing services and solutions. The Intelligent Health Management Business segment provides intelligent health management services. The Intelligent Application Business segment offers intelligent application products. It also provides value-added system integration services comprising presale technical program advice, after-sale product installation, tuning, optimization, and operation and maintenance services. The company serves finance, retail, transportation, energy, manufacturing, healthcare, telecommunication, and media industries, as well as governments. Futong Technology Development Holdings Limited was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.
